case_definition: Familial or sporadic ALS induced motor neurons
comparison_label: Answer ALS transcriptomics curated first-wave contrast
inclusion_rule_summary: Included in curated subset als_cns_dimn_extended because table 1 reports explicit dimn transcriptomic counts, but the exact public identifiers and per-subtype subset manifests still need stable recovery.
exclusion_rule_summary: Restrict the contrast to the curated case and control arms defined in configs/subsets/als_cns_dimn_extended.yaml.
leakage_risks: Do not use downstream validation outcomes as discovery-time features.
